_comment: Per-model comparison config. Sampling params omitted where model defaults are correct — only override resolution, seed, and params that differ from defaults.

cases.prompt: A futuristic cyberpunk city at night, neon lights reflecting on wet streets

report_framework_reasons.lightx2v: Tracked LightX2V version has no FLUX.1 serving path; FLUX coverage starts at FLUX.2.

default.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated when the best command changes for a SGLang release or commit.

h100-h200-1gpu-compile.description: Hopper single-GPU legacy-compatible FLUX compile profile.
h100-h200-1gpu-compile.notes: Use for SGLang commits before --performance-mode speed existed; keep compile enabled for fastest available legacy path.

h100-h200-2gpu-tp-compile.description: Hopper 2-GPU TP legacy-compatible FLUX compile profile.
h100-h200-2gpu-tp-compile.notes: Use for SGLang commits before --performance-mode speed existed; TP remains explicit.

blackwell-1gpu-compile.description: Blackwell single-GPU legacy-compatible FLUX compile profile.
blackwell-1gpu-compile.notes: Use for SGLang commits before --performance-mode speed existed; keep compile enabled for fastest available legacy path.

blackwell-2gpu-tp-compile.description: Blackwell 2-GPU TP legacy-compatible FLUX compile profile.
blackwell-2gpu-tp-compile.notes: Use for SGLang commits before --performance-mode speed existed; TP remains explicit.

h100-h200-1gpu-speed-compile.description: Hopper single-GPU fastest FLUX profile probe.
h100-h200-1gpu-speed-compile.notes: Steady-state fastest profile candidate; use CUDA norm to avoid FlashInfer CUTE norm JIT on Hopper.

h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed-compile.description: Hopper 2-GPU TP fastest FLUX profile probe.
h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed-compile.notes: Steady-state fastest profile candidate; TP is explicit and CUDA norm avoids FlashInfer CUTE norm JIT on Hopper.

blackwell-1gpu-speed-compile.description: Blackwell single-GPU fastest FLUX profile probe.
blackwell-1gpu-speed-compile.notes: Steady-state fastest profile candidate for Blackwell; use with DIFFUSION_BENCH_DISABLE_TORCH_COMPILE=0.

blackwell-2gpu-tp-speed-compile.description: Blackwell 2-GPU TP fastest FLUX profile probe.
blackwell-2gpu-tp-speed-compile.notes: Steady-state fastest profile candidate for Blackwell; TP is explicit instead of relying on server-side auto inference.

default.description: Best known vLLM-Omni command for aligned non-cache benchmark runs.
default.notes: Uses env-selected FlashAttention; torch compile is disabled by the benchmark harness.

h100-h200-1gpu-compile.description: Hopper single-GPU fastest vLLM-Omni FLUX profile probe.
h100-h200-1gpu-compile.notes: Use with DIFFUSION_BENCH_DISABLE_TORCH_COMPILE=0 so the harness does not append eager/compile-off args.

h100-h200-2gpu-tp-compile.description: Hopper 2-GPU TP fastest vLLM-Omni FLUX profile probe.
h100-h200-2gpu-tp-compile.notes: The harness adds --tensor-parallel-size 2 when num_gpus=2; use with compile allowed.

blackwell-1gpu-compile.description: Blackwell single-GPU fastest vLLM-Omni FLUX profile probe.
blackwell-1gpu-compile.notes: Use with DIFFUSION_BENCH_DISABLE_TORCH_COMPILE=0 so the harness does not append eager/compile-off args.

blackwell-2gpu-tp-compile.description: Blackwell 2-GPU TP fastest vLLM-Omni FLUX profile probe.
blackwell-2gpu-tp-compile.notes: The harness adds --tensor-parallel-size 2 when num_gpus=2; use with compile allowed.

default.description: Best known TensorRT-LLM VisualGen command for aligned non-cache FLUX.1 runs.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated as the best command changes. trtllm-serve auto-detects the FLUX.1 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

h100-h200-1gpu-speed.description: Hopper single-GPU TensorRT-LLM VisualGen FLUX.1 profile probe.
h100-h200-1gpu-speed.notes: TRTLLM attention-backend kernels on Hopper. trtllm-serve auto-detects the FLUX.1 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed.description: Hopper 2-GPU TP TensorRT-LLM VisualGen FLUX.1 profile probe.
h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed.notes: Harness appends --tp_size 2 when num_gpus=2. trtllm-serve auto-detects the FLUX.1 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

default.description: Best known LightX2V command/config for aligned non-cache benchmark runs.
default.notes: Uses explicit fast attention/offload settings; no cache, torch compile, or quantized model path.

h200-fa3-flashinfer.description: H200 fastest available LightX2V command/config for aligned non-cache benchmark runs.
h200-fa3-flashinfer.notes: Uses FlashAttention 3 with FlashInfer RoPE in the isolated H200 LightX2V venv; no cache, torch compile, or quantized model path.

blackwell-fa2-flashinfer.description: Blackwell LightX2V FLUX.2 profile probe using source-built FlashAttention 2 plus FlashInfer RoPE.
blackwell-fa2-flashinfer.notes: Uses a source-built FlashAttention 2 wheel with TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST=10.0; the upstream FA3 wheel used for H200 is Hopper-only.

default.description: Best known TensorRT-LLM VisualGen command for aligned non-cache FLUX.2 runs.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated as the best command changes. trtllm-serve auto-detects the FLUX.2 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

cases._note: Ideogram-4 derives steps and guidance from its sampling preset (V4_DEFAULT_20: 20 steps, final guidance 7); guidance_scale is intentionally omitted because the model rejects an explicit value.

report_framework_reasons.vllm-omni: Latest vLLM-Omni has no Ideogram-4 serving path (image-gen coverage is FLUX/Qwen-Image/Wan).
report_framework_reasons.lightx2v: Latest LightX2V has no Ideogram-4 serving path.
report_framework_reasons.trtllm-visual: Latest TensorRT-LLM VisualGen has no Ideogram-4 serving path (coverage is FLUX/Wan/LTX-2/Qwen-Image/Cosmos3).

default.description: Best known SGLang command for Ideogram-4 T2I at 2-GPU TP.
default.notes: Tensor-parallel across 2 GPUs; no cache, no torch compile. Keep updated as the best command changes.

h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed.description: Hopper 2-GPU TP fastest Ideogram-4 profile probe.
h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed.notes: Speed mode + CUDA norm on Hopper; TP is explicit. Torch compile left off pending FP8 compile validation on GPU.

default.description: Best known SGLang command for the benchmark repo default profile.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated when the best command changes for a SGLang release or commit.

h200-2gpu.description: H200 command for the LTX2 two-stage 121-frame case.
h200-2gpu.notes: Resident mode keeps both stages in VRAM on H200-class GPUs.

default.description: Best known vLLM-Omni command for the LTX-2 two-stage 2-GPU case.
default.notes: Uses diffusion CFG parallelism and env-selected FlashAttention; no torch compile or cache path.

default.description: LightX2V upstream LTX-2 t2av path for the LTX-2 121-frame case.
default.notes: Uses upstream LTX-2 audio-video t2av runner with CFG parallelism; no cache, torch compile, or quantized model path.

h200-2gpu.notes: Matches upstream scripts/ltx2/run_ltx2_t2av_cfg_parallel.sh semantics with compile disabled by the benchmark harness.

h100-1gpu.description: H100 LightX2V LTX-2 t2av block-offload command/config.
h100-1gpu.notes: Uses upstream block offload because TP keeps Gemma and one DiT shard resident on rank0 and OOMs on H100 80GB.

cases.prompt: A cat and a dog baking a cake together in a kitchen.

report_framework_reasons.vllm-omni: No compatible vLLM-Omni LTX2.3 serving profile is configured.

default.description: Fallback SGLang command when no hardware-specific profile matches.
default.notes: Use hardware-specific profiles for formal H100/H200 runs.

h100-80gb-2gpu.description: Cookbook-aligned H100 80GB command for the LTX2.3 two-stage 121-frame case.
h100-80gb-2gpu.notes: Snapshot mode avoids H100 resident VRAM pressure.

h200-2gpu.description: Cookbook-aligned H200 command for the LTX2.3 two-stage 121-frame case.
h200-2gpu.notes: Resident mode is the fastest LTX2.3 two-stage path when both DiTs fit in VRAM.

official-original-2gpu.description: Official stage-switching semantics profile for LTX2.3 two-stage comparisons.
official-original-2gpu.notes: Use this only when official switching semantics are more important than latency.

default.description: LightX2V upstream LTX-2.3 t2av path for the LTX-2.3 121-frame case.
default.notes: Uses upstream LTX-2.3 audio-video runner. CFG parallel is not enabled because upstream mm_guider and cfg_parallel are not compatible.

h200-2gpu-tp.description: H200 same-GPU LightX2V LTX-2.3 t2av tensor-parallel command/config.
h200-2gpu-tp.notes: Use tensor parallelism for same-GPU comparison because upstream mm_guider raises when combined with cfg_parallel.

h200-1gpu.notes: Single-GPU profile follows current upstream LTX-2.3 scripts; no cache, torch compile, or quantized model path.

h100-1gpu.description: H100 LightX2V LTX-2.3 t2av block-offload command/config.
h100-1gpu.notes: Best attempted H100 server profile. Upstream ltx2_3_offload and this full Gemma/VAE offload path still OOM after warmup on 80GB GPUs.

default.description: Cosmos3 Nano T2I profile for SGLang-Diffusion main 3d540563.
default.notes: Guardrails disabled for framework-only serving performance; no cache or torch compile path.

h200-1gpu-fa.description: H200 single-GPU Cosmos3 Nano T2I profile.
h200-1gpu-fa.notes: Single-card image serving profile; guardrails disabled, no cache, torch compile disabled by harness.

h200-1gpu-fa-speed.description: H200 single-GPU Cosmos3 Nano T2I speed-mode probe profile.
h200-1gpu-fa-speed.notes: Same as the formal single-card profile plus explicit speed mode; guardrails disabled, no cache, torch compile disabled by harness.

h200-1gpu-fa-batch4.description: H200 single-GPU Cosmos3 Nano T2I batch-size-4 probe profile.
h200-1gpu-fa-batch4.notes: Batching probe for high-pressure throughput; guardrails disabled, no cache, torch compile disabled by harness.

default.description: Cosmos3 Nano T2I profile for vLLM-Omni main 40b2959.
default.notes: Uses a legacy stage config to set Cosmos3 guardrails=false at the diffusion stage; FlashAttention, no cache, eager/compile-off harness args.

h200-1gpu-fa.description: H200 single-GPU Cosmos3 Nano T2I profile.
h200-1gpu-fa.notes: Single-card image serving profile; guardrails disabled via legacy stage config, no cache, torch compile disabled by harness.

default.description: Best known TensorRT-LLM VisualGen command for aligned non-cache Cosmos3 runs.
default.notes: Keep this profile updated as the best command changes. trtllm-serve auto-detects the Cosmos3 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

h100-h200-1gpu-speed.description: Hopper single-GPU TensorRT-LLM VisualGen Cosmos3 profile probe.
h100-h200-1gpu-speed.notes: TRTLLM attention-backend kernels on Hopper. trtllm-serve auto-detects the Cosmos3 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed.description: Hopper 2-GPU TP TensorRT-LLM VisualGen Cosmos3 profile probe.
h100-h200-2gpu-tp-speed.notes: Harness appends --tp_size 2 when num_gpus=2. trtllm-serve auto-detects the Cosmos3 diffusion model; add --extra_visual_gen_options <model>.yml for steady-state tuning. PyTorch backend, no TeaCache and no torch compile so the row stays cache-free and comparable. Needs GPU validation.

cases.prompt: A small warehouse robot moves a blue box across a clean floor.

report_framework_reasons.lightx2v: No tracked LightX2V Cosmos3 serving path in this benchmark.

default.description: Cosmos3 Nano T2V profile for SGLang-Diffusion main 3d540563.
default.notes: 4-GPU CFG parallel plus Ulysses SP for long-video H200 serving; guardrails disabled, no cache.

h200-4gpu-cfg-ulysses.notes: Same 4-GPU budget as vLLM-Omni; combines CFG parallel and sequence parallel for the 189-frame 720p case.

h200-4gpu-cfg-ulysses-speed.description: H200 4-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video speed-mode probe profile.
h200-4gpu-cfg-ulysses-speed.notes: Same as the formal 4-GPU CFG+Ulysses profile plus explicit speed mode; guardrails disabled, no cache, torch compile disabled by harness.

h200-2gpu-cfg.description: H200 2-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video profile using CFG parallelism only.
h200-2gpu-cfg.notes: Uses the two GPUs for CFG parallelism only; sp_degree is pinned to 1 to avoid automatic sequence-parallel inference.

h200-2gpu-cfg-speed.description: H200 2-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video speed-mode profile using CFG parallelism only.
h200-2gpu-cfg-speed.notes: same two-GPU CFG-only profile plus explicit speed mode; sp_degree is pinned to 1 to avoid automatic sequence-parallel inference

default.description: Cosmos3 Nano T2V profile for vLLM-Omni main 40b2959.
default.notes: Uses vLLM-Omni recommended context parallelism for extra GPUs plus CFG parallel; no cache, eager/compile-off harness args.

h200-4gpu-cfg-ulysses.notes: Same 4-GPU budget as SGLang-Diffusion; no cache or torch compile path.

h200-1gpu-fa.description: H200 single-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video probe profile.
h200-1gpu-fa.notes: Official single-server path with FlashAttention, guardrails disabled, no cache, torch compile disabled by harness.

h200-2gpu-auto.description: H200 2-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video probe profile using vLLM-Omni device placement only.
h200-2gpu-auto.notes: Tracks whether vLLM-Omni can choose its own 2-GPU video layout; no cache or torch compile path.

h200-2gpu-cfg.description: H200 2-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video probe profile using CFG parallelism.
h200-2gpu-cfg.notes: Uses the two GPUs for CFG parallelism with guardrails disabled via legacy stage config; no cache or torch compile path.

h200-2gpu-ulysses.description: H200 2-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video probe profile using Ulysses sequence parallelism.
h200-2gpu-ulysses.notes: Uses the two GPUs for Ulysses sequence parallelism; no cache or torch compile path.

h200-4gpu-auto.description: H200 4-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video probe profile using vLLM-Omni device placement only.
h200-4gpu-auto.notes: Tracks whether vLLM-Omni can choose its own 4-GPU video layout; no cache or torch compile path.

h200-4gpu-cfg.description: H200 4-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video probe profile using CFG parallelism.
h200-4gpu-cfg.notes: Uses CFG parallelism within a 4-GPU budget; no cache or torch compile path.

h200-4gpu-ulysses.description: H200 4-GPU Cosmos3 Nano video probe profile using Ulysses sequence parallelism.
h200-4gpu-ulysses.notes: Uses all four GPUs for Ulysses sequence parallelism; no cache or torch compile path.
